statement: TSMC monthly CoWoS capacity could reach 120,000 to 140,000 wafers in 2026, and with OSAT partners total industry capacity could approach 200,000 wafers per month, expanding AI packaging supply.
why: Rapid packaging capacity expansion adds AI chip supply headroom, the main lever loosening the current bottleneck.

impact.mechanism: Rising CoWoS and OSAT packaging capacity expands the supply of assembled AI accelerators.

evidence.excerpt: TSMC's monthly CoWoS capacity could reach a record 120,000 to 140,000 wafers in 2026.

confidence.basis: Secondary TrendForce free news desk; capacity figures from cited institutional estimates.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: magnitude 3 -> 2; sources: Tom's Hardware custom AI ASIC state of play, TrendForce News CoWoS supply-demand gap
